# PAIRIS optional ESMFold2 folding environment (conda env name: "esmfold2").
# Used by bin/run_esmfold2.py when folding_backend: esmfold2. Create this in a
# separate mamba/conda env (or uv venv) and point the `esmfold2_conda_env`
# parameter at it (default: "esmfold2").
#
# NOTE: the `esm` fork below transitively installs a FORKED `transformers`
# (git+https://github.com/Biohub/transformers.git) that provides
# `transformers.models.esmfold2`. Plain PyPI `transformers` does NOT have this
# module and will NOT work — do not add `transformers` to this file.
#
# Requires an NVIDIA GPU (CUDA); ESMFold2 inference is GPU-only.
#
# The model is downloaded from HuggingFace Hub on first run
# (biohub/ESMFold2-Fast for the 'fast' variant, biohub/ESMFold2 for 'full').
# Set `esmfold2_hf_home` to a cache dir and pre-download on a node with network
# (HPC compute nodes often have no internet).
#
# Tested with Python 3.12. Reproducibility pins (from esmfold2-test/uv.lock):
#   torch==2.12.0
#   esm==3.3.0            (Biohub fork @ c94ed8d)
#   transformers==4.57.6  (Biohub fork @ 3a8956fb; pulled in transitively by esm)
#   pydantic==2.13.4
#   numpy==2.4.6
#   huggingface-hub==0.36.2
#   accelerate==1.13.0
torch>=2.2.0
esm @ git+https://github.com/Biohub/esm.git@c94ed8d
pydantic>=2.0
